why_this_action.summary: Prepared curator assets were stale: already-contacted targets were still marked prepared, which made the execution board and curator handoff packet advertise fake next steps during a flat-adoption window.

execution_board_targets: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?

expected_outcome: Future lane selection and follow-through artifacts stop pointing at already-contacted curator targets, so the next marketing run is more likely to take a genuinely new Codeberg-moving action.

measurement_window.success_metric: AI Dev Setup and AI for Code no longer appear as prepared curator targets; execution board only shows still-actionable assets.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If stale prepared curator targets reappear without a new send, patch the queue generator itself instead of relying on load-time normalization alone.
